tasks.title: Package store and source model
tasks.definition_of_done: Local and git sources parse deterministically; global/project packages.toml and package-lock.toml read/write through temp directories; lock entries record source path, optional git commit, cache path, and manifest hash; tests cover Windows-style paths and a local bare git repository clone/ref-pin fixture without touching real user config.

evaluator_notes: Issue 1 (SSH @ misparse): noted for future, not DoD blocker
Issue 2 (TomlSer variant): fixed

tasks.title: Package CLI MVP

inference_notes.reason: Task title, DoD, tier, dependencies, and owned paths come from the reviewed Phase 5 implementation plan task sections and task graph summary.

cli-runtime gate now explicitly requires opi subprocess E2E assertions on stdout, stderr, and exit code.

evaluator_notes: Issue 1 (list/doctor global scope): noted for future, not MVP scope

tasks.title: Adapter protocol types

tasks.title: Adapter process host
tasks.definition_of_done: Host starts a child process, performs initialize/capabilities handshake, sends correlated requests, times out requests, sends best-effort cancel, drops event messages under backpressure, reports adapter crash/unavailable states, and reaps the child on shutdown.

inference_notes.reason: Task title, DoD, tier, dependencies, and owned paths come from the reviewed Phase 5 implementation plan task sections and task graph summary.
Phase 5 tasks touch CLI runtime, package execution, adapter process behavior, cross-crate runtime integration, or public docs, so the opi-implement risk gate is required.
Adapter contract cases now explicitly include request correlation, cancel, event backpressure/drop, crash handling, and process reap behavior.

evaluator_notes: Finding 1 (stderr deadlock): fixed - stderr drain task added
Finding 2 (dead AdapterExited variant): fixed - exit code detection in handshake
Finding 3 (unused_imports): evaluator error - import truly unused on this toolchain

session_notes: Iteration 1: all gates passed. 16 tests. Evaluator found 3 issues; 2 fixed (stderr drain, AdapterExited detection), 1 was evaluator error.

tasks.title: Adapter runtime bridge
tasks.definition_of_done: Adapter capabilities become runtime tools, commands, selected hooks, event observers, session-scoped state serialize/restore handlers, cancellation bridge, static model overrides, and documented bridge semantics through existing extension/hook contracts.

inference_notes.reason: Task title, DoD, tier, dependencies, and owned paths come from the reviewed Phase 5 implementation plan task sections and task graph summary.
Phase 5 tasks touch CLI runtime, package execution, adapter process behavior, cross-crate runtime integration, or public docs, so the opi-implement risk gate is required.

Bridge DoD now locks state serialize/restore, model overrides, cancellation, and public bridge documentation coverage.
workspace tier now explicitly includes cargo test --workspace --all-targets and smoke.

evaluator_notes: Finding 1 (model_overrides semantic mismatch): noted for future, not exercised in Phase 5 MVP

Finding 5 (test 9 doesn't verify skip): fixed - test now verifies host is still responsive after skipped hook
Finding 6 (cancel race): noted for future, best-effort by design
Finding 7 (no caching in tools()): noted for future, trait contract allows it

session_notes: Iteration 1: all gates passed. Evaluator found 7 issues; 3 fixed (block_in_place docs, after_tool_call content, test 9 coverage), 4 noted for future.

5.evaluator_summary: All 9 Phase 5 tasks passing. 1770 workspace tests. 15 documentation guard tests enforce truthful Phase 5 MVP descriptions. Package CLI (add/remove/list/doctor), manifest V2 with adapter declarations, process-JSONL adapter hosting via opi-extension-jsonl-v1, adapter-to-runtime bridging, and runnable example adapter packages all verified. Cross-cutting gates pass: fmt, clippy, doc, smoke.
